pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Introduce the Sonic ultrasonic sensor library repository, explain that it contains two implementations (modern and legacy), and provide high-level guidance on which version to use

pages.title: Modern Implementation
pages.purpose: Overview of the modern Sonic library implementation (documented in README.md), highlighting its advanced features, architecture, and use cases

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Quick start guide for the modern implementation, including basic setup, first example, and common usage patterns

pages.title: Core Concepts
pages.purpose: Explain the fundamental concepts of the modern implementation: two-phase initialization, built-in validation, automatic unit conversion, and the measurement/filtering pipeline

pages.title: API Reference
pages.purpose: Comprehensive reference for all classes and methods in the modern implementation

pages.title: Sonic Class
pages.purpose: Document the Sonic class structure, constructor, and overall design pattern

pages.title: attach() Method
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the attach() method for configuring trigger and echo pins

pages.title: scream() Method
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the scream() method including parameters (MinimalLimit, MaximalLimit), return values, error handling, and internal conversion logic

pages.title: average() Method
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the average() method including the Times parameter, filtering behavior, and error propagation

pages.title: Multi-Sensor Usage
pages.purpose: Explain how to use multiple Sonic objects to manage multiple ultrasonic sensors concurrently, including example code and best practices

pages.title: Error Handling and Validation
pages.purpose: Explain the built-in validation system, -1 error codes, range limits, and how to handle invalid readings in application code

pages.title: Architecture and Design
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the internal architecture: sensor initialization, measurement pipeline, unit conversion, validation logic, and design decisions

pages.title: Future Development
pages.purpose: Document planned features including non-blocking scream() and additional filter implementations (median, outlier rejection, etc.)

pages.title: Legacy Implementation
pages.purpose: Overview of the legacy Sonic library (from Sonic.zip), its traditional Arduino library structure, and when it might be appropriate to use

pages.title: Installation and Setup
pages.purpose: How to install the legacy library via Arduino IDE Library Manager, library structure (library.properties, keywords.txt), and basic setup

pages.title: API Reference
pages.purpose: Document the legacy API: Sonic(trigPin, echoPin) constructor, ping(), read(), microsecondsToInches(), and microsecondsToCentimeters()

pages.title: Example Usage
pages.purpose: Walk through the ReadAndPrint.ino example, explaining the setup() and loop() pattern and how to implement custom averaging or filtering

pages.title: Hardware Setup
pages.purpose: Common hardware integration guide covering HC-SR04 sensor wiring, pin connections (TRIG/ECHO), power requirements, and physical setup considerations

pages.title: Implementation Comparison
pages.purpose: Side-by-side comparison of modern vs legacy implementations covering initialization patterns, measurement methods, unit conversion, validation, filtering, and architectural philosophy

pages.title: Migration Guide
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for migrating from the legacy implementation to the modern implementation, including code examples showing before/after patterns and common pitfalls
